briefdescription.para: Callback used in the I/O Input API to detect if the current handler can provide input functionality for this resource.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes and 0 if another Input module should be used

briefdescription.para: Callback used in the I/O Input API to open the resource.

simplesect.para: an Input context or NULL in case or error

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* xmlInputReadCallback) (void *context, char *buffer, int len)
memberdef.name: xmlInputReadCallback

briefdescription.para: Callback used in the I/O Input API to read the resource.

parameterdescription.para: the buffer to store data read
the length of the buffer in bytes

simplesect.para: the number of bytes read or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Callback used in the I/O Input API to close the resource.

simplesect.para: 0 or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Callback used in the I/O Output API to detect if the current handler can provide output functionality for this resource.

simplesect.para: 1 if yes and 0 if another Output module should be used

briefdescription.para: Callback used in the I/O Output API to open the resource.

simplesect.para: an Output context or NULL in case or error

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* xmlOutputWriteCallback) (void *context, const char *buffer, int len)
memberdef.name: xmlOutputWriteCallback

briefdescription.para: Callback used in the I/O Output API to write to the resource.

parameterdescription.para: the buffer of data to write
the length of the buffer in bytes

simplesect.para: the number of bytes written or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Callback used in the I/O Output API to close the resource.

simplesect.para: 0 or -1 in case of error

memberdef.definition: typedef xmlParserInputBuffer *(* xmlParserInputBufferCreateFilenameFunc) (const char *URI, xmlCharEncoding enc)
memberdef.name: xmlParserInputBufferCreateFilenameFunc

briefdescription.para: Signature for the function doing the lookup for a suitable input method corresponding to an URI.

simplesect.para: the new xmlParserInputBuffer in case of success or NULL if no method was found.

memberdef.definition: typedef xmlOutputBuffer *(* xmlOutputBufferCreateFilenameFunc) (const char *URI, xmlCharEncodingHandler *encoder, int compression)
memberdef.name: xmlOutputBufferCreateFilenameFunc

briefdescription.para: Signature for the function doing the lookup for a suitable output method corresponding to an URI.

simplesect.para: the new xmlOutputBuffer in case of success or NULL if no method was found.

briefdescription.para: clears the entire input callback table.

detaileddescription.para: this includes the compiled-in I/O.

briefdescription.para: Clear the top input callback from the input stack.

detaileddescription.para: this includes the compiled-in I/O.

simplesect.para: the number of input callback registered or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Registers the default compiled-in I/O handlers.
Create a buffered parser input for progressive parsing.

detaileddescription.para: The encoding argument is deprecated and should be set to XML_CHAR_ENCODING_NONE. The encoding can be changed with xmlSwitchEncoding or xmlSwitchEncodingName later on.

simplesect.para: the new parser input or NULL

briefdescription.para: Create a buffered parser input for the progressive parsing of a file Automatic support for ZLIB/Compress compressed document is provided by default if found at compile-time.

detaileddescription.para: Do an encoding check if enc == XML_CHAR_ENCODING_NONE
Allows the actual function to be overridden with xmlParserInputBufferCreateFilenameDefault.

parameterdescription.para: a C string containing the URI or filename

simplesect.para: the new parser input or NULL

briefdescription.para: Create a buffered parser input for the progressive parsing of a FILE * buffered C I/O.

detaileddescription.para: The encoding argument is deprecated and should be set to XML_CHAR_ENCODING_NONE. The encoding can be changed with xmlSwitchEncoding or xmlSwitchEncodingName later on.

simplesect.para: the new parser input or NULL

briefdescription.para: Create a buffered parser input for the progressive parsing for the input from a file descriptor.

detaileddescription.para: The encoding argument is deprecated and should be set to XML_CHAR_ENCODING_NONE. The encoding can be changed with xmlSwitchEncoding or xmlSwitchEncodingName later on.

simplesect.para: the new parser input or NULL

briefdescription.para: Create a parser input buffer for parsing from a memory area.

detaileddescription.para: This function makes a copy of the whole input buffer. If you are sure that the contents of the buffer will remain valid until the document was parsed, you can avoid the copy by using xmlParserInputBufferCreateStatic.
The encoding argument is deprecated and should be set to XML_CHAR_ENCODING_NONE. The encoding can be changed with xmlSwitchEncoding or xmlSwitchEncodingName later on.

parameterdescription.para: the length of the memory block

simplesect.para: the new parser input or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Create a parser input buffer for parsing from a memory area.

detaileddescription.para: This functions assumes that the contents of the input buffer remain valid until the document was parsed. Use xmlParserInputBufferCreateMem otherwise.
The encoding argument is deprecated and should be set to XML_CHAR_ENCODING_NONE. The encoding can be changed with xmlSwitchEncoding or xmlSwitchEncodingName later on.

parameterdescription.para: the length of the memory block

simplesect.para: the new parser input or NULL in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlInputReadCallback ioread, xmlInputCloseCallback ioclose, void *ioctx, xmlCharEncoding enc)
memberdef.name: xmlParserInputBufferCreateIO

briefdescription.para: Create a buffered parser input for the progressive parsing for the input from an I/O handler.

detaileddescription.para: The encoding argument is deprecated and should be set to XML_CHAR_ENCODING_NONE. The encoding can be changed with xmlSwitchEncoding or xmlSwitchEncodingName later on.

simplesect.para: the new parser input or NULL

briefdescription.para: Same as xmlParserInputBufferGrow.

parameterdescription.para: indicative value of the amount of chars to read

simplesect.para: the number of chars read and stored in the buffer, or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Grow up the content of the input buffer, the old data are preserved This routine handle the I18N transcoding to internal UTF-8 This routine is used when operating the parser in normal (pull) mode.

parameterdescription.para: indicative value of the amount of chars to read

simplesect.para: the number of chars read and stored in the buffer, or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Push the content of the arry in the input buffer This routine handle the I18N transcoding to internal UTF-8 This is used when operating the parser in progressive (push) mode.

parameterdescription.para: the size in bytes of the array.

simplesect.para: the number of chars read and stored in the buffer, or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Free up the memory used by a buffered parser input.
lookup the directory for that file

simplesect.para: a new allocated string containing the directory, or NULL.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlInputMatchCallback matchFunc, xmlInputOpenCallback openFunc, xmlInputReadCallback readFunc, xmlInputCloseCallback closeFunc)
memberdef.name: xmlRegisterInputCallbacks

briefdescription.para: Register a new set of I/O callback for handling parser input.

simplesect.para: the registered handler number or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create a buffered parser input for the progressive parsing of a file Automatic support for ZLIB/Compress compressed document is provided by default if found at compile-time.

detaileddescription.para: Do an encoding check if enc == XML_CHAR_ENCODING_NONE
Internal implementation, never uses the callback installed with xmlParserInputBufferCreateFilenameDefault.

parameterdescription.para: a C string containing the URI or filename

simplesect.para: the new parser input or NULL

briefdescription.para: clears the entire output callback table.

detaileddescription.para: this includes the compiled-in I/O callbacks.

briefdescription.para: Remove the top output callbacks from the output stack.

detaileddescription.para: This includes the compiled-in I/O.

simplesect.para: the number of output callback registered or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Registers the default compiled-in I/O handlers.
Create a buffered parser output.

detaileddescription.para: Consumes encoder but not in error case.

simplesect.para: the new parser output or NULL

briefdescription.para: Create a buffered output for the progressive saving of a file If filename is "-" then we use stdout as the output.

detaileddescription.para: Automatic support for ZLIB/Compress compressed document is provided by default if found at compile-time.
Consumes encoder but not in error case.
Allows the actual function to be overridden with xmlOutputBufferCreateFilenameDefault.

parameterdescription.para: a C string containing the URI or filename

simplesect.para: the new output or NULL

briefdescription.para: Create a buffered output for the progressive saving to a FILE * buffered C I/O.

detaileddescription.para: Consumes encoder but not in error case.

simplesect.para: the new parser output or NULL

briefdescription.para: Create a buffered output for the progressive saving to a xmlBuffer.

detaileddescription.para: Consumes encoder but not in error case.

simplesect.para: the new parser output or NULL

briefdescription.para: Create a buffered output for the progressive saving to a file descriptor.

detaileddescription.para: Consumes encoder but not in error case.

simplesect.para: the new parser output or NULL

briefdescription.para: Create a buffered output for the progressive saving to an I/O handler.

detaileddescription.para: Consumes encoder but not in error case.

simplesect.para: the new parser output or NULL

briefdescription.para: Gives a pointer to the data currently held in the output buffer.

simplesect.para: a pointer to the data or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Gives the length of the data currently held in the output buffer.

simplesect.para: 0 in case or error or no data is held, the size otherwise

briefdescription.para: Write the content of the array in the output I/O buffer This routine handle the I18N transcoding from internal UTF-8 The buffer is lossless, i.e.

detaileddescription.para: will store in case of partial or delayed writes.

parameterdescription.para: the size in bytes of the array.

simplesect.para: the number of chars immediately written, or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Write the content of the string in the output I/O buffer This routine handle the I18N transcoding from internal UTF-8 The buffer is lossless, i.e.

detaileddescription.para: will store in case of partial or delayed writes.

simplesect.para: the number of chars immediately written, or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Write the content of the string in the output I/O buffer This routine escapes the characters and then handle the I18N transcoding from internal UTF-8 The buffer is lossless, i.e.

detaileddescription.para: will store in case of partial or delayed writes.

simplesect.para: the number of chars immediately written, or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: flushes the output I/O channel

simplesect.para: the number of byte written or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: flushes and close the output I/O channel and free up all the associated resources

simplesect.para: the number of byte written or a negative xmlParserErrors code in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlOutputMatchCallback matchFunc, xmlOutputOpenCallback openFunc, xmlOutputWriteCallback writeFunc, xmlOutputCloseCallback closeFunc)
memberdef.name: xmlRegisterOutputCallbacks

briefdescription.para: Register a new set of I/O callback for handling output.

simplesect.para: the registered handler number or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create a buffered output for the progressive saving of a file If filename is "-" then we use stdout as the output.

detaileddescription.para: Automatic support for ZLIB/Compress compressed document is provided by default if found at compile-time.
Consumes encoder but not in error case.
Internal implementation, never uses the callback installed with xmlOutputBufferCreateFilenameDefault.

parameterdescription.para: a C string containing the URI or filename

simplesect.para: the new output or NULL
NULL.

briefdescription.para: A specific entity loader disabling network accesses, though still allowing local catalog accesses for resolution.

parameterdescription.para: the URL or system ID for the entity to load
the public ID for the entity to load
the context in which the entity is called or NULL

simplesect.para: a new allocated xmlParserInput, or NULL.
a copy of path.

briefdescription.para: if stat is not available on the target machine,

simplesect.para: 0 if stat fails, 2 if stat succeeds and the file is a directory, 1 otherwise.
1 if matches, 0 otherwise
an IO context or NULL in case or failure
the number of bytes read or < 0 in case of failure
0 or -1 an error code case of error

briefdescription.para: Registers a callback for URI input file handling.

parameterdescription.para: function pointer to the new ParserInputBufferCreateFilenameFunc

simplesect.para: the old value of the registration function

briefdescription.para: Registers a callback for URI output file handling.

parameterdescription.para: function pointer to the new OutputBufferCreateFilenameFunc

simplesect.para: the old value of the registration function

briefdescription.para: Set per-thread default value.

simplesect.para: the old value

briefdescription.para: Set per-thread default value.

simplesect.para: the old value

briefdescription.para: I/O interfaces used by the parser.

detaileddescription.para: Functions and datatypes for parser input and output.

simplesect.para: See Copyright for the status of this software.
Daniel Veillard
